data.title: Ethereum’s Network Is Heating Up While Price Stalls, Is a Breakout Coming?
data.description:
Ethereum is currently trading in a period of subdued price movement, reflecting broader consolidation across the crypto asset market. At the time of writing, ETH is trading around $2,423, marking a slight 0. 9% daily decrease and standing more than 50% below its all-time high of $4,878. This stagnation has coincided with a broader lack of catalysts to drive a sustained rally, leaving traders cautious about Ethereum’s near-term trajectory
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-network-is-heating-up-while-price-stalls-is-a-breakout-coming/

data.title: NOYA.ai has a security vulnerability, the official called for a suspension of use, the accident was caused by the behavior of internal developers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News NOYA.ai officials said on the X platform: "A potential vulnerability has been found on NOYA. The team has launched a comprehensive investigation. We will keep the community informed of progress. During this period, please suspend use." In addition, NOYA.ai responded in the Discord community that there is currently no risk to user wallets and no additional operations are required. The team is advancing the recovery process and is expected to release a detailed announcement tomorrow morning. The official said that the incident was caused by an unauthorized developer, the situation is complicated, and it is being handled with all efforts.

data.description:
The digital currency market is changing fast, with users now leaning toward projects that show real value rather than chasing trends. data.title: NOYA.ai Investigates Potential Security Vulnerability
data.description: According to Odaily, NOYA.ai has announced on the X platform that a potential vulnerability has been discovered. The team is conducting a thorough investigation and will keep the community updated on progress. Users are advised to pause usage during this period. Additionally, NOYA.ai has assured its Discord community that user wallets are not at risk and no additional actions are required. The team is working on recovery processes and plans to release a detailed announcement by tomorrow morning. The incident was reportedly caused by an unauthorized developer, and the situation is being addressed with urgency.

data.title: DBR 24H increase of more than 50%, market value exceeds 81 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that deBridge (DBR) has risen by more than 50% in 24 hours, with a market value exceeding 81 million US dollars and a current price of 0.027 US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $501 million yesterday, continuing a 14-day net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 27, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$501 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net inflow of US$166 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.961 billion.
The second is Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$153 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$52.309 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$133.17 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 6.25%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$48.872 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$77.4472 million yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 27, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$77.4472 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$48.1025 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$5.517 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$28.8635 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.647 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.877 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 3.37%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$4.178 billion.

data.title: More than $2.1 billion in crypto assets were stolen in the first half of 2025, 70% of which came from North Korean-related hacker groups
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the TRM Labs report, the cumulative losses in the crypto field due to hacker attacks in the first half of 2025 exceeded US$2.1 billion, of which about US$1.6 billion (70%) were carried out by North Korean-related organizations. The largest case was the US$1.5 billion robbery against Bybit in February, setting a record high. The report pointed out that more than 80% of the stolen funds came from infrastructure-level intrusions, including private key theft and front-end hijacking. In addition, on June 18, another organization named GonjeshkeDarande launched a targeted attack on the Iranian exchange Nobitex, with an amount of approximately US$90 million, indicating that national-level cyber operations are exacerbating industry security risks. (Coincu)

data.title: Binance Alpha is in decline, with yesterday's trading volume of $487 million, down 70% from its high point
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Dune data, Binance Alpha's trading volume reached US$487.07 million on June 27, which remained at a low level. On June 8, Binance Alpha's daily trading volume peaked at US$2.04 billion, and then began to decline. Today's daily trading volume has dropped by more than 70% from its peak.
